title: polypodium lycopodioides var. surinamense
intro: Polypodium lycopodioides var. surinamense is a variety of the Polypodium lycopodioides species, a type of fern native to the tropical regions of South America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and infections. The health benefits of Polypodium lycopodioides var. surinamense include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and act as a natural antiseptic. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used topically to treat skin conditions and internally to promote overall health and well-being.
